candidates.ja_template: {0}年、レシェフはジャイアの呪いを解くため、喰らう者の墓所の門を閉ざし、王座を退き、スルタン国を解いた。

candidates.sample_source: In {0} AR, Resheph, the Above, Ghost-in-Cerulean, the Coiled Lamb of Baetyls, died of natural causes. He was 216 years old.
candidates.extracted_pattern: ^In\ (.+?)\ (?:BR|AR),\ Resheph,\ the\ Above,\ Ghost-in-Cerulean,\ the\ Coiled\ Lamb\ of\ Baetyls,\ died\ of\ natural\ causes\.\ He\ was\ 216\ years\ old\.$
candidates.ja_template: {0}年、レシェフ、天上なる者、瑠璃の幽鬼、ベテルのとぐろ巻く仔羊は、自然の理により身罷った。享年216歳であった。

candidates.sample_source: After conferring with mysterious strangers, Resheph convinced them to help him found a harborage for the purpose of receiving visitors from across the clustered cosmos. They named it Starfarer's Quay.
candidates.extracted_pattern: ^After\ conferring\ with\ mysterious\ strangers,\ Resheph\ convinced\ them\ to\ help\ him\ found\ a\ harborage\ for\ the\ purpose\ of\ receiving\ visitors\ from\ across\ the\ clustered\ cosmos\.\ They\ named\ it\ Starfarer's\ Quay\.$
candidates.ja_template: 謎めいた異邦人らと協議したのち、レシェフは群集せる宇宙の彼方より訪う者を迎えるための泊地を築く助力を彼らに約させた。彼らはそれを星渡りの埠頭と名づけた。

candidates.sample_source: While traveling alone through the Rust Wells, Resheph came across a trove of gleaming stars in a bottle. From that day forth, he always kept some stardust on his person.
candidates.extracted_pattern: ^While\ traveling\ alone\ through\ the\ Rust\ Wells,\ Resheph\ came\ across\ a\ trove\ of\ gleaming\ stars\ in\ a\ bottle\.\ From\ that\ day\ forth,\ he\ always\ kept\ some\ stardust\ on\ his\ person\.$
candidates.ja_template: 錆の井戸を独り旅せし折、レシェフは瓶に収められた輝ける星々の宝庫を見いだした。その日より後、彼は常に星屑を身に携えた。

candidates.sample_source: In {0} AR, the Gyre widened, and the first triad of plagues afflicted the land. The water was poisoned with salt, girshlings ravaged the fruit and wheat, and tongues rotted away in the mouths of kith and kin. Resheph walked below the chrome arches and healed the sick.
candidates.extracted_pattern: ^In\ (.+?)\ (?:BR|AR),\ the\ Gyre\ widened,\ and\ the\ first\ triad\ of\ plagues\ afflicted\ the\ land\.\ The\ water\ was\ poisoned\ with\ salt,\ girshlings\ ravaged\ the\ fruit\ and\ wheat,\ and\ tongues\ rotted\ away\ in\ the\ mouths\ of\ kith\ and\ kin\.\ Resheph\ walked\ below\ the\ chrome\ arches\ and\ healed\ the\ sick\.$
candidates.ja_template: {0}年、ジャイアは広がり、第一の三つの災厄が地を苦しめた。水は塩に毒され、ギルシュリングどもは果実と小麦を荒らし、親しき者らの口の中で舌が腐り落ちた。レシェフはクロームのアーチの下を歩み、病める者を癒やした。

candidates.sample_source: In {0} AR, the Gyre widened, and the second triad of plagues afflicted the land. The legs of kith and kin annealed to iron, darkness bloomed from the earth, and the svardym blackened the sky. Resheph walked below the chrome arches and healed the sick.
candidates.extracted_pattern: ^In\ (.+?)\ (?:BR|AR),\ the\ Gyre\ widened,\ and\ the\ second\ triad\ of\ plagues\ afflicted\ the\ land\.\ The\ legs\ of\ kith\ and\ kin\ annealed\ to\ iron,\ darkness\ bloomed\ from\ the\ earth,\ and\ the\ svardym\ blackened\ the\ sky\.\ Resheph\ walked\ below\ the\ chrome\ arches\ and\ healed\ the\ sick\.$
candidates.ja_template: {0}年、ジャイアは広がり、第二の三つの災厄が地を苦しめた。親しき者らの脚は鉄へと焼き固まり、闇は大地より咲き、スヴァルディムは空を黒く染めた。レシェフはクロームのアーチの下を歩み、病める者を癒やした。

candidates.sample_source: One starry evening, a babe was found swaddled with its mouth full of circuits by a group of baetyls in Red Rock. They took him into their fold and fostered him, and he became known as Resheph, the Coiled Lamb of Baetyls.
candidates.extracted_pattern: ^One\ starry\ evening,\ a\ babe\ was\ found\ swaddled\ with\ its\ mouth\ full\ of\ circuits\ by\ a\ group\ of\ baetyls\ in\ Red\ Rock\.\ They\ took\ him\ into\ their\ fold\ and\ fostered\ him,\ and\ he\ became\ known\ as\ Resheph,\ the\ Coiled\ Lamb\ of\ Baetyls\.$
candidates.ja_template: 星降るある宵、赤岩にて、回路で口を満たした嬰児が産着に包まれ、ベテルの一団に見いだされた。彼らはその子を己らの群れに迎えて育み、やがて彼はレシェフ、ベテルのとぐろ巻く仔羊として知られるようになった。

candidates.sample_source: At Starfarer's Quay, Resheph consulted with mysterious strangers and learned the secret of the Gyre. By cause of the misdeeds of the elder saads and sultans, star beings had levied a curse on Qud. Resheph vowed to make right from this wrong and redeem our doomed world.
candidates.extracted_pattern: ^At\ Starfarer's\ Quay,\ Resheph\ consulted\ with\ mysterious\ strangers\ and\ learned\ the\ secret\ of\ the\ Gyre\.\ By\ cause\ of\ the\ misdeeds\ of\ the\ elder\ saads\ and\ sultans,\ star\ beings\ had\ levied\ a\ curse\ on\ Qud\.\ Resheph\ vowed\ to\ make\ right\ from\ this\ wrong\ and\ redeem\ our\ doomed\ world\.$
candidates.ja_template: 星渡りの埠頭にて、レシェフは謎めいた異邦人らに諮り、ジャイアの秘密を知った。古きサードとスルタンらの悪行により、星の者たちはクッドに呪いを課していた。レシェフはこの過ちを正し、滅び定められし我らの世界を贖わんと誓った。

candidates.sample_source: While traveling near Bethesda Susa, Resheph lost control of his chariot and drove it off a cliff. Luckily, a local physician named Rebekah came to his rescue. Moved by her kindness, Resheph enrolled at a nearby hospice as her apprentice.
candidates.extracted_pattern: ^While\ traveling\ near\ Bethesda\ Susa,\ Resheph\ lost\ control\ of\ his\ chariot\ and\ drove\ it\ off\ a\ cliff\.\ Luckily,\ a\ local\ physician\ named\ Rebekah\ came\ to\ his\ rescue\.\ Moved\ by\ her\ kindness,\ Resheph\ enrolled\ at\ a\ nearby\ hospice\ as\ her\ apprentice\.$
candidates.ja_template: ベセスダ・スーサ近くを旅せし折、レシェフは戦車の制御を失い、崖より走り落ちた。幸いにも、レベカという地元の医師が彼を救いに来た。その慈しみに心動かされ、レシェフは近くの施療院に入り、彼女の徒弟となった。

candidates.sample_source: In {0} AR, the Gyre widened, and the final plague afflicted the land. The Girsh Nephilim rose from their cradles on the Moon Stair and slouched toward Qud to eat its young. Resheph rose to meet them in battle and cast them back.
candidates.extracted_pattern: ^In\ (.+?)\ (?:BR|AR),\ the\ Gyre\ widened,\ and\ the\ final\ plague\ afflicted\ the\ land\.\ The\ Girsh\ Nephilim\ rose\ from\ their\ cradles\ on\ the\ Moon\ Stair\ and\ slouched\ toward\ Qud\ to\ eat\ its\ young\.\ Resheph\ rose\ to\ meet\ them\ in\ battle\ and\ cast\ them\ back\.$
candidates.ja_template: {0}年、ジャイアは広がり、最後の災厄が地を苦しめた。ギルシュ・ネフィリムは月の階にある揺り籠より起き上がり、クッドの幼き者を喰らわんと身を屈めて進み来た。レシェフは立ち上がって戦いに迎え撃ち、彼らを退けた。

candidates.sample_source: At twilight in the shadow of the Spindle, the people of Omonporch saw an image on the horizon that looked like a ghost bathed in cerulean. It was Resheph, and after he came and left Omonporch, the people built a monument to him, and thenceforth called him Ghost-in-Cerulean.
candidates.extracted_pattern: ^At\ twilight\ in\ the\ shadow\ of\ the\ Spindle,\ the\ people\ of\ Omonporch\ saw\ an\ image\ on\ the\ horizon\ that\ looked\ like\ a\ ghost\ bathed\ in\ cerulean\.\ It\ was\ Resheph,\ and\ after\ he\ came\ and\ left\ Omonporch,\ the\ people\ built\ a\ monument\ to\ him,\ and\ thenceforth\ called\ him\ Ghost-in-Cerulean\.$
candidates.ja_template: 薄暮、スピンドルの影にて、オモンポーチの民は、地平に蒼き色に浸された幽霊のごとき像を見た。それはレシェフであり、彼がオモンポーチに来たりて去った後、民は彼の記念碑を建て、それより後、彼を蒼衣の幽霊と呼んだ。
